data.title: Encryption Protocols
data.description: WhatsApp's chats are protected with state-of-the-art encryption protocols.
data.technical_spec: Implementation of the Signal Protocol for end-to-end encryption.

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Strong authentication mechanisms to verify user identity and prevent unauthorized access.

data.title: Data Backup and Recovery
data.description: Secure methods for backing up and recovering user data.
data.technical_spec: Optional encryption of backups on iCloud and Google Drive.

data.title: Traffic Analysis Mitigation
data.description: Techniques to prevent unauthorized traffic monitoring and data inference.
data.technical_spec: Encrypted metadata and minimized data exposure techniques.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Ongoing security audits to detect and fix vulnerabilities promptly.
